meta.note: Embroidery-area dimensions are industry-standard estimates (estimated=true). Confirm against real garments before production.

panels.label: Left chest
panels.note: Classic monogram/logo spot, ~180-200mm below shoulder seam, ~90mm from front placket

panels.label: Center back yoke
panels.note: Below the collar on the back yoke

panels.label: Inside breast lining
panels.note: Interior left-breast lining monogram (the traditional spot)

panels.label: Full back (showpiece)
panels.note: Large arched name across the back - costume/christening showpiece; near the hoop limit
